data.four_set_effect: Defeating an opponent has a 100% chance to remove Elemental Skill CD. Can only occur once every 15s.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A pair of blue earrings that, when worn, calm the mind and encourage a rational assessment of risks.
circlet_of_logos.title: Gambler's Earrings

flower_of_life.desc: A big, luxurious flower that can hide loaded dice.
flower_of_life.title: Gambler's Brooch

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: This vessel was specially made for a single purpose. It has absolutely no secret compartments built into it.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Gambler's Dice Cup

plume_of_death.desc: The tail feather of a large bird. Perfect for discretely concealing a trump card.
plume_of_death.title: Gambler's Feather Accessory

sands_of_eon.desc: A shattered pocket watch that once took a lethal hit for its owner.
sands_of_eon.title: Gambler's Pocket Watch

list.desc: Gamblers like to flaunt their wealth, although their money can disappear overnight.</br>She would wear this huge, exotic flower ornament on her ears. It certainly catches the eye.</br>But what they would not see is the trick dice carefully hidden within the flower.</br>The gambler would only sneak this dice out of the brooch in an urgent situation.</br>Swapping in this dice under the vigilant eyes of the guests was how she turned the table around.</br>
list.title: Gambler's Brooch

list.desc: These ostentatious earrings are the perfect representation of the gambler's transient wealth.</br>The glimmer of the gem is just as soothing as the sky and the lake.</br>The earrings would be coated with a mildly sedative substance to keep the gambler calm in the game.</br>In games where one gambles with life and death, remaining calm and composed is the key to winning.</br>
list.title: Gambler's Earrings

list.desc: Every gambler is superstitious to some degree. Many are very fond of custom-made dice cups, for instance.</br>This was her custom-made dice cup. Despite what one might expect, there was nothing dishonest about it. It had no hidden mechanisms.</br>Fate only decides half of one's dice rolls. The other half are decided by oneself.</br>And yet, she never rolled the dice away from the gambling table.</br>
list.title: Gambler's Dice Cup

list.desc: This colorful feather served to decorate a gambler's hat. Its flamboyance disgusts true aristocrats.</br>But what the aristocrats do not see is the delicate mechanism hidden beneath the surface.</br>When the time comes, the gambler subtly swaps in a hidden, game-changing card.</br>Upon seeing this card, the disdain and condescension on the aristocrats' faces would instantly give way to sheer shock.</br>
list.title: Gambler's Feather Accessory

list.desc: Perfect timing is necessary for the gambler's trick to work.</br>That's why she always had this golden pocket watch in her breast pocket.</br>In countless games, there was always that crucial moment when her sensitive perception of time saved her.</br>
list.title: Gambler's Pocket Watch
